creator: kirillrdy@gmail.com
text:
I did search "gnome-light" in bugzilla before filing this bug, looks like i am first.

on fresh install, doing pkg install -y xorg and pkg install gnome3-light
and the starting using exec gnome-session results in crash,
I originally blamed it on lack of 3d acceleration, but installing full gnome fixes it.

So I assume it just some missing dependencies in gnome-light.
I can provide whatever logs are necessary, i am sorry if I don't do it now, as I am not sure what is most relevant.

Also I am curious why I am first to find this.

Cheers,

Kirill R
